message:
fix: throw result.error with enriched metadata in execSync and execFileSync

When the native exec result contains an error object (e.g. from spawn
failures or timeouts), enrich it with status, stdout, stderr, pid, and
signal fields before throwing, matching Node.js child_process behavior.
Previously these errors would fall through to the generic non-zero exit
code handler, losing the original error context and type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
